title: adonis annua
intro: Adonis annua, also known as annual adonis or dragon flower, is a perennial plant native to Asia and Europe, characterized by its unique, showy flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Adonis annua include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and relieving symptoms associated with colds and flu. Adonis annua is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
